article_title: Alibaba Unveils Qwen3.7-Max at Cloud Summit, a Long-Horizon Agent Model That Ran Autonomously for 35 Hours
summary: Submission approvable with 1 minor warning(s) — file a corrections record on merge

content_preview.title: Alibaba Unveils Qwen3.7-Max at Cloud Summit, a Long-Horizon Agent Model That Ran Autonomously for 35 Hours
content_preview.summary: Qwen3.7-Max debuts at Alibaba's Cloud Summit in Hangzhou as the company's most capable agent model, sustaining continuous autonomous execution for 35 hours in internal testing.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Alibaba unveiled Qwen3.7-Max at its Cloud Summit in Hangzhou on May 20, positioning the model as its flagship for the agent era. The release follows the Qwen3.6 series by approximately one month and marks a continued shift in Alibaba's strategy: the proprietary Max tier is kept closed while the companion Qwen3.7-Plus will be open-sourced, [according to Decrypt](https://decrypt.co/368499/alibaba-qwen-3-7-max-preview-review).

At the event, Liu Weiguang, Alibaba Cloud's senior vice pr...

recommendations: 1 source(s) blocked bot access (Reuters 401) — the Lin Junyang resignation context should be noted as unverified from snapshot
The 1,000 tool calls and 10x inference speed improvement claims are not found in any available source snapshot

editor_notes.content_quality: Well-structured News article on Qwen3.7-Max launch at Alibaba Cloud Summit. Appropriate scope at 721 words. Good context on leadership disruption and open-source strategy.
editor_notes.source_verification: source-0.html.gz (scmp.com article 1): Confirmed 35-hour autonomous run claim, Liu Weiguang 'AI factory' quote, five-layer stack description, Zhou Jingren quote about top-tier benchmarks, 'long-horizon tasks' description. The '1,000 tool calls' and 'roughly 10x improvement in inference speed' claims are attributed to this source but NOT found in the snapshot — these appear to be unverified specifics. source-1.html.gz (scmp.com article 2): Confirmed 'trail behind top US products' quote, Qwen3.7 arriving a month after Qwen3.6, Arena preview ranking context. source-2.html.gz (decrypt.co): Confirmed 'Plus gets open-sourced, Max stays proprietary' characterization, Alibaba killed free tier of Qwen Code, Arena rankings (13th global, 7th math, 9th expert, 9th software), sixth-ranked AI lab globally. reuters.com source (source-3): HTTP 401 — snapshot unavailable. The Reuters claim about Lin Junyang's resignation and Foundation Model Task Force is unverifiable from snapshot; it is used only in the Analysis section as background context, not in headline/summary/lead.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: Core claims are well-sourced. Two specific quantitative claims ('more than 1,000 tool calls' and 'roughly 10x improvement in inference speed') attributed to SCMP are not found in the SCMP snapshot — these are likely from a press release or demo details referenced by SCMP but not in the archived page. The Reuters background on leadership departures is unverifiable (401 block) but Reuters is a credible source and this is background context in the Analysis section, not a lead claim.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral and professional. Appropriately hedged ('if reproducible under independent testing'). No editorializing.
editor_notes.originality: Prior Qwen 3.6 coverage exists (April 23 article) but this is a new version with a materially different feature set (35-hour autonomous run, Cloud Summit launch). Not a duplicate.
concerns: The '1,000 tool calls' and '10x inference speed improvement' claims attributed to SCMP are not found in the SCMP snapshot. These are specific quantitative claims that cannot be verified from available sources.
Reuters source blocked (401) — Lin Junyang resignation context unverified from snapshot, though Reuters is a credible outlet.
recommendations: Corrections note should document the unverified quantitative specifics about the 35-hour run demonstration.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: Solid article on a newsworthy AI release. The headline and lead claim (35 hours autonomous) are verified. Two subordinate specifics in the 35-hour run section are unverifiable from snapshots. APPROVE_WITH_CORRECTIONS is appropriate.
